description: A designed vertical agency promotional poster for ICE's Law Enforcement Support Center (LESC). The background is a desaturated black-and-white close-up photograph of a young Black man in profile wearing a telephone headset with boom mic and eyeglasses, evidently a call-center operator/analyst, with a faint blue digital '1s and 0s' binary-code overlay across the dark left side suggesting data and technology. Top-left carries the blue-and-white DHS seal and the text 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement.' Mid-left, in white serif type with the last line in blue, reads: 'Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world.' The lower-left features a large bold sans-serif lockup 'LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER' (with 'SUPPORT' in blue and red triple-slash marks) followed by the URL 'ICE.gov/LESC'. Visual style is corporate-institutional, monochrome with blue/red accent typography. Messaging technique: promotes the LESC as a competent, high-tech 24/7 information hub aiding police nationwide/worldwide, positioning ICE as an indispensable law-enforcement partner. Target audience: state/local law enforcement agencies and the general public.
notable_text: Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world. LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER  ICE.gov/LESC
